div.p: Specification: Atomic Removal of Entity ID and Associated Component Memory

ul.li: Generational Invalidation: By incrementing the version in the generations array (at index), all existing handles (pointers) to this entity become stale. Comparison handle.gen == generations[index] will return false.
Sparse Set Removal: The swap-and-pop pattern in the dense array ensures the component storage remains contiguous for cache-friendly iteration, even after arbitrary deletions.

Atomic Boundary: If destroy_immediate fails midway, the entity exists in a "Zombie" state. Manual implementations must ensure the Generations_Array update is the last step if transactions are not supported.
